creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
On Fri, Aug 28, 2009 at 05:41:01PM +0000, linimon@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [PATCH] audio/libshout2: take maintainership
> 
> Responsible-Changed-From-To: chinsan->freebsd-ports-bugs
> Responsible-Changed-By: linimon
> Responsible-Changed-When: Fri Aug 28 17:40:11 UTC 2009
> Responsible-Changed-Why: 
> Maintainer was reset.

Should have read "chinsan is inactive at the moment."
